name: Grade 8 Geography — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 8 pathway for advanced geographic analysis, geospatial data, development, and global systems. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 8 knowledge and transferable skills in advanced geographic analysis, geospatial data, development, and global systems.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about advanced geographic analysis, geospatial data, development, and global systems and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
